synced:
[00:00.57] Seize a move, you're on me, falling, and we were dissolving
[00:08.02] You and me, skies above and wide, it brings on the true night on me
[00:16.02] 
[00:30.63] All I could feel was a goodbye
[00:33.45] Those only words you wrote, it's plenty to understand ya
[00:37.10] The sun is going down, the sky behind and visions of you would stand
[00:41.41] Overlapping with you and the fence beyond
[00:45.34] Remember the night that we met up?
[00:48.00] Broke into me and taken everything left in my heart
[00:51.64] So fragile is the air, it always keeps on revolving near and wide
[00:56.02] Loneliness envelops deep in your eyes
[00:59.57] It's stuck in tick and tocking mode
[01:01.41] Never refraining shamble, block of sound
[01:03.23] Too many terrible noises around and the voice ringing in me gets louder
[01:06.42] With tears about to fall
[01:07.83] I need to find me an average happy tiptoe
[01:10.91] Locating, never tough when I'm with you
[01:14.54] Saw what got seen hid beneath, and louder nights keep beating
[01:18.18] I'm going to you, and giving brighter shiny tomorrows
[01:21.80] What can night for you mean infinite? You could run with me
[01:25.58] Place your hand in mine, you gotta stay, hold up
[01:28.68] Want to leave it behind, dark cruel days, in deep, you may have hid before
[01:33.05] I'm embracing you until more heat dissolve what is caught up
[01:36.74] Sun will soon rise up into a day you're no more too afraid
[01:41.39] Keep all of me in you
[01:44.60] 
[01:57.54] Only perceiving through your eyes
[02:00.01] I see nothing, I'll soon hate you, keep me out, I'm crying out
[02:03.79] You're falling into deeper fascination, giving away your love
[02:08.05] That expression has got me crying out
[02:11.82] She's gonna try to me, she's gonna lie
[02:13.42] Got to force a belief and trust to keep on
[02:15.65] Every time it happens, heap of attack, and now I'm back in
[02:17.78] I got to cry, then who knows?
[02:19.14] So we gotta keep on
[02:20.28] If you gotta keep on
[02:21.04] Then we're gonna keep on
[02:22.04] One day, we will understand, I'm believing in you
[02:27.08] 
[02:40.09] No, wanna stop it, you got me tired of walking
[02:42.49] As I show my needs, I reach to get back on, still not fit in
[02:45.75] You free my hand, then leave it
[02:47.44] No, wanna stop it, you got me tired of walking
[02:49.51] Never told you the truth, I'm feeling that inside
[02:54.13] Back for another tick and tocking mode
[02:56.06] Never refraining shamble, block of sound
[02:57.75] Killing, oh, too many words that I gathered around
[02:59.65] Won't let me go to your mind
[03:01.10] "I want it to be done" is what went out
[03:03.26] It found a way to finally leak out of me
[03:05.40] And for once, I could make you let out a smile
[03:10.49] Saw what got seen hid beneath, and louder nights are keeping me down
[03:14.66] My new images of you now appear heavenly now
[03:18.48] What can night for you mean when fallen seas of tears are gone?
[03:22.17] They dissolve into the peace inside of you
[03:27.32] Calling to life, hit beneath, crying days in the eternal
[03:31.32] Give me what I saw in you, oh, what an end to stop all
[03:34.97] Seize a move, you're on me, falling and we were dissolving
[03:38.76] See me to it, fog is leaving, bright air move
[03:41.74] Won't you leave it behind? Tucked all days away, forget, and hid beneath
[03:46.16] Hand in hand, extend to me, that let me know beyond falls
[03:49.51] Through the seas of beyond, so loud and blows you afloat in the sky
[03:54.06] New wind moving into you
[03:56.38] Tonight, don't ever lose sight of me and let go
[03:59.76] You and me are running through the night in dark, I'll take you
[04:02.56]
plain:
Seize a move, you're on me, falling, and we were dissolving
You and me, skies above and wide, it brings on the true night on me

All I could feel was a goodbye
Those only words you wrote, it's plenty to understand ya
The sun is going down, the sky behind and visions of you would stand
Overlapping with you and the fence beyond

Remember the night that we met up?
Broke into me and taken everything left in my heart
So fragile is the air, it always keeps on revolving near and wide
Loneliness envelops deep in your eyes

It's stuck in tick and tocking mode
Never refraining shamble, block of sound
Too many terrible noises around and the voice ringing in me gets louder
With tears about to fall
I need to find me an average happy tiptoe
Locating, never tough when I'm with you

Saw what got seen hid beneath, and louder nights keep beating
I'm going to you, and giving brighter shiny tomorrows
What can night for you mean infinite? You could run with me
Place your hand in mine, you gotta stay, hold up
Want to leave it behind, dark cruel days, in deep, you may have hid before
I'm embracing you until more heat dissolve what is caught up
Sun will soon rise up into a day you're no more too afraid
Keep all of me in you

Only perceiving through your eyes
I see nothing, I'll soon hate you, keep me out, I'm crying out
You're falling into deeper fascination, giving away your love
That expression has got me crying out

She's gonna try to me, she's gonna lie
Got to force a belief and trust to keep on
Every time it happens, heap of attack, and now I'm back in
I got to cry, then who knows?
So we gotta keep on
If you gotta keep on
Then we're gonna keep on
One day, we will understand, I'm believing in you

No, wanna stop it, you got me tired of walking
As I show my needs, I reach to get back on, still not fit in
You free my hand, then leave it
No, wanna stop it, you got me tired of walking
Never told you the truth, I'm feeling that inside

Back for another tick and tocking mode
Never refraining shamble, block of sound
Killing, oh, too many words that I gathered around
Won't let me go to your mind
"I want it to be done" is what went out
It found a way to finally leak out of me
And for once, I could make you let out a smile

Saw what got seen hid beneath, and louder nights are keeping me down
My new images of you now appear heavenly now
What can night for you mean when fallen seas of tears are gone?
They dissolve into the peace inside of you

Calling to life, hit beneath, crying days in the eternal
Give me what I saw in you, oh, what an end to stop all
Seize a move, you're on me, falling and we were dissolving
See me to it, fog is leaving, bright air move

Won't you leave it behind? Tucked all days away, forget, and hid beneath
Hand in hand, extend to me, that let me know beyond falls
Through the seas of beyond, so loud and blows you afloat in the sky
New wind moving into you
Tonight, don't ever lose sight of me and let go
You and me are running through the night in dark, I'll take you
